zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Waltham於大約1403年出生在英國英格蘭艾可格亞特 沃爾坦時，她的父親Humphrey Waltham27歲，母親Agatha4歲。她於1420年與John Cornish在英國英格蘭艾可格亞特 沃爾坦結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1490年在她的家鄉享年88歲。

nameMeanings.name: Waltham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Waltham (Lincs, Essex, Leics) or any of the numerous other places so named.

variants.name: Whatham
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Waltham  .

variants.name: Wattam
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Waltham  .

variants.name: Whattam
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Waltham  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Waltham was born about 1403, in Great Waltham, Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Humphrey Waltham, was 27 and her mother, Agatha, was 4. She married John Cornish in 1420, in Great Waltham, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1490, in her hometown, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Waltham est née environ 1403, à Great Waltham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Humphrey Waltham, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Agatha, avait 4 ans. Elle a épousé John Cornish en 1420, à Great Waltham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1490, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 88 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Walthamが約1403年にイギリスイギリスエセックスグレアト ワルサムで生まれた時，父Humphrey Walthamは27歳，母Agathaは4歳であった。1420年にイギリスイギリスエセックスグレアト ワルサムでJohn Cornishと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1490年に故郷で88歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Waltham(이)가 대략 1403년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 그리트 월섬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Humphrey Waltham(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agatha(은)는 4세였다. 그녀는 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 그리트 월섬에서 John Cornish(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1490년 그녀의 고향에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com John Cornish em 1420, em Great Waltham, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1490, em sua cidade natal, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Waltham родилась около 1403 г. в местности грит валтам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Humphrey Waltham было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Agatha, 4. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Cornish в 1420 г. в местности грит валтам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1490 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 88 лет.
